text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Damn it! Why?! I was so convinced I could win.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
My legs just like... wouldn't listen to me. Don't tell
me I've hit my limit already.
choice_data_list: Let today's result motivate you for next time.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
My legs just like... wouldn't listen to me. Don't tell
me I've hit my limit already.
choice_data_list: Let today's result motivate you for next time.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Next time... huh. You're right, this loss isn't the
end.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
There's a lot we'll have to review, like how I
approach turns, or my initial momentum...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It's just like modeling. You get better step by
step, then eventually you start getting bigger
projects.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
All right, no more moping. I need to accept the
results and move on!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You think I really believed that? Like hell
I've hit my limit!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I mean, like, in modeling, I get gigs that seem out
of my league all the time, but I make it work.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Wait, so why am I yelling at you then? I don't
know... Sorry about that.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I should take action before I start complaining.
Just watch, Trainer—the next race is mine!
